ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with ICC Certificate of Origin format. All fields legible. Page 2 contains an embedded invoice copy (visaed by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce) which is part of the certificate file, not the independent verification invoice.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. Single page invoice. All fields legible.

document_pairing.method: File-based pairing per 8.5.0. Certificate from file 1 (Document A, page 1). Invoice from file 2 (Document B, page 1). Page 2 of Document A is an embedded visaed invoice copy belonging to the certificate file — not used for verification per rule 8.5.0.

criteria_met: Consignor 'ARA Timber AB' matches invoice issuer 'ARA Timber AB'
Consignee 'Gulf Timber Co' matches invoice customer 'Gulf Timber Co'
Invoice number not explicitly stated in certificate, but consignor and consignee both confirmed

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-439567' does not contain 'LC' as a separate bank term label. No L/C, LC No., Documentary Credit or similar bank term identified.

locations.location: Footer — company name block: 'ARA Timber AB'
locations.context: ARA Timber AB listed as the issuer/company in footer with address Vallgatan 27, 411 16 GÖTEBORG, Sweden
ARA TIMBER displayed as branding/logo text at top of invoice

candidates.raw_text: PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
candidates.normalized_text: po box 019433, port of jeddah, saudi arabia

Lot 4B

candidates.normalized_text: lot 4b, 1x40 hc containers, 9 packages, gross weight: 24 600 kgs, redwood

candidates.raw_text: PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah, Jeddah, SAUDI ARABIA
candidates.normalized_text: po box 019433, port of jeddah, jeddah, saudi arabia

REDWOOD
KD, L/P
V 50x200  21,87 CBM
VI 50x250  5,67 CBM
VI 38x225  16,644 CBM
candidates.normalized_text: redwood kd l/p v 50x200 21.87 cbm vi 50x250 5.67 cbm vi 38x225 16.644 cbm

consignor.certificate_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16 GÖTEBORG, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'ARA Timber AB' in all invoice files
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — exact match in invoice footer company block: 'ARA Timber AB'. Also found as branding 'ARA TIMBER' in header.
Certificate: 'ARA Timber AB' vs Invoice footer: 'ARA Timber AB' — EXACT MATCH after normalization.
Certificate: 'SWEDEN' vs Invoice: 'Sweden' (footer address) — MATCH. Also corroborated by VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556976003501.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Direct juridisk part matching — exact name match
Indirect land verification via VAT prefix SE

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'ARA Timber AB' at Vallgatan 27, 411 16, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN. Invoice issuer is 'ARA Timber AB' at Vallgatan 27, 411 16 GÖTEBORG, Sweden with VAT No SE556976003501. Company name is an exact match. Address differs only in city spelling (GOTHENBURG vs GÖTEBORG — both are the same city, Gothenburg/Göteborg). Country is SWEDEN in both. MATCH established via 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.1.

consignee.certificate_value: Gulf Timber Co, PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value: Gulf Timber Co, PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah, Jeddah, SAUDI ARABIA

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice 'Customer' field contains 'Gulf Timber Co, PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah, Jeddah, SAUDI ARABIA'. This is the primary billing/customer field.
Certificate: 'Gulf Timber Co' vs Invoice Customer: 'Gulf Timber Co' — EXACT MATCH.
Certificate: 'Saudi Arabia' vs Invoice: 'SAUDI ARABIA' — MATCH after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 — Customer field identified as primary billing field
Country verification — Saudi Arabia matches SAUDI ARABIA

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Gulf Timber Co' at PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah, Saudi Arabia. Invoice customer is 'Gulf Timber Co' at PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah, Jeddah, SAUDI ARABIA. Company name exact match. Address matches (PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah in both; invoice adds 'Jeddah' city name which is additional info, not a contradiction). Country: 'Saudi Arabia' = 'SAUDI ARABIA' after case normalization. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in certificate
comparison_steps.result: No specific article numbers in certificate. Skip to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify identity-bearing main designation in certificate
comparison_steps.result: Certificate box 6 goods description: 'REDWOOD'. Identity-bearing main designation is 'REDWOOD'. Invoice description section begins with 'REDWOOD'. EXACT MATCH.

Invoice adds 'KD, L/P' and dimension specifications (V 50x200, VI 50x250, VI 38x225). These are product specification details that do not change the identity-bearing designation 'REDWOOD'. Certificate also includes 'Lot 4B', '1x40´HC Containers', '9 packages', 'Gross weight: 24 600 kgs' which are shipping/packaging details matching invoice.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'REDWOOD' found exactly in invoice
Additional details (KD, L/P, dimensions) are non-identity-bearing additions

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description in box 6 contains 'REDWOOD' as the identity-bearing main designation. Invoice description section lists 'REDWOOD' as the first line, followed by specifications 'KD, L/P' and three dimension/grade variants (V 50x200, VI 50x250, VI 38x225). The identity-bearing designation 'REDWOOD' is an exact match. Additional details in both documents (Lot 4B, 1x40'HC Containers, 9 packages, gross weight 24 600 kgs) are consistent between certificate and invoice. MATCH per 4.3.3.

quantity.certificate_value: 44,184 CBM (box 7); also 9 packages, Gross weight: 24 600 kgs (box 6)

comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains '44,184 CBM'. This is the verification-basis quantity per rule 4.4.2.1.
Invoice states '9 packages / 44,184 cbm'. The value 44,184 (= 44.184) CBM is explicitly present. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check additional quantities in box 6 for contradictions
comparison_steps.result: Certificate box 6: 'Gross weight: 24 600 kgs'. Invoice: 'Gross weight: 24 600 kgs'. Exact match. No contradiction. Certificate box 6: '9 packages'. Invoice: '9 packages'. Exact match. No contradiction.

comparison_steps.description: Verify CBM total against line items
comparison_steps.result: Invoice line items: 21.87 + 5.67 + 16.644 = 44.184 CBM. This matches both the invoice total '44,184 cbm' and certificate box 7 '44,184 CBM'. Consistent.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity (44,184 CBM) identified as verification basis
Direct occurrence check — 44,184 CBM found in invoice
Additional quantities (GW 24 600 kgs, 9 packages) verified without contradiction

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '44,184 CBM'. Invoice explicitly states '44,184 cbm' in the shipment summary line '9 packages / 44,184 cbm'. Direct occurrence match for the primary verification-basis quantity. Additionally, certificate box 6 states 'Gross weight: 24 600 kgs' which matches invoice 'Gross weight: 24 600 kgs' exactly (after thousands separator normalization per 4.4.3.3: '24 600' = 24600). Certificate box 6 states '9 packages' matching invoice '9 packages'. All three quantity types are consistently confirmed. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' field. Additionally, shipping marks include 'MADE IN SWEDEN'.
Certificate: 'SWEDEN' → 'sweden'. Invoice: 'Sweden' → 'sweden'. Exact match after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via explicit 'Country of origin' field
Positive verification — SWEDEN explicitly confirmed in invoice origin field

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'SWEDEN' as country of origin. Invoice has explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' field. After case normalization, both resolve to 'sweden'. Additionally, invoice shipping marks state 'MADE IN SWEDEN', providing further corroboration. Single origin country, no mixed origin complexity. MATCH per 4.5.5.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE — No LC reference found in certificate
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Certificate number 'SEG-26D-439567' does not contain 'LC' as a separate bank term. No field labeled 'L/C No.', 'Letter of Credit', or 'Documentary Credit' identified.

rule_evaluation_log.result: APPLIED — Certificate from Document A page 1, Invoice from Document B page 1. Document A page 2 is an embedded visaed invoice copy belonging to certificate file.
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Two files received. Document A contains certificate (page 1) and embedded invoice copy (page 2). Document B contains the independent invoice for verification.

rule_evaluation_log.result: PASSED — Consignor and consignee both match between certificate and invoice
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Criterion 2: consignor 'ARA Timber AB' matches invoice issuer. Criterion 3: consignee 'Gulf Timber Co' matches invoice customer.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name search in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — 'ARA Timber AB' found in invoice footer and header
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Exact company name found in footer company block. Branding 'ARA TIMBER' found in header.
Certificate: 'ARA Timber AB' = Invoice: 'ARA Timber AB'
Corroborated by VAT prefix SE in SE556976003501

rule_evaluation_log.result: APPLIED — 'Customer' field identified as primary billing field

rule_evaluation_log.detail: Certificate: 'Gulf Timber Co' = Invoice: 'Gulf Timber Co'

rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — Saudi Arabia = SAUDI ARABIA after case normalization
APPLIED — Invoice additions (KD, L/P, dimension specs) do not change product identity
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Additional specifications are product details, not identity-changing

rule_evaluation_log.description: Direct occurrence check for box 7 quantity

rule_evaluation_log.result: NO CONTRADICTION — GW 24 600 kgs matches; 9 packages matches

rule_evaluation_log.detail: Space as thousands separator in '24 600 kgs'

rule_evaluation_log.result: FOUND — 'Country of origin: Sweden' in explicit origin field
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Also corroborated by 'MADE IN SWEDEN' in shipping marks

rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — SWEDEN = Sweden after case normalization

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren ARA Timber AB i Sverige är identisk i certifikatet och fakturan. Mottagaren Gulf Timber Co i Saudiarabien matchar exakt. Varubeskrivningen REDWOOD, kvantiteten 44,184 CBM, bruttovikten 24 600 kgs och ursprungslandet Sverige är samtliga verifierade utan avvikelser. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN
sections.invoice_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16 GÖTEBORG, Sweden (VAT No SE556976003501)
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning — exakt företagsnamn identifierat i fakturan. Land verifierat via adressblock och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'ARA Timber AB' återfinns exakt som företagsnamn i fakturans sidfot. Adress Vallgatan 27, 411 16 överensstämmer (GOTHENBURG/GÖTEBORG är samma stad). Land SWEDEN verifierat via fakturans adress 'Sweden' och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: Gulf Timber Co, PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
sections.invoice_value: Gulf Timber Co, PO Box 019433, Port of Jeddah, Jeddah, SAUDI ARABIA
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning mot fakturans kundfält (Customer). Exakt namnmatchning och landöverensstämmelse.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Gulf Timber Co' återfinns exakt i fakturans Customer-fält. PO Box 019433 och Port of Jeddah matchar. Land 'Saudi Arabia' = 'SAUDI ARABIA' efter normalisering av versaler.

sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'REDWOOD' identifierad exakt i fakturan. Ytterligare specifikationer (dimensioner, kvaliteter) är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'REDWOOD' som varubeskrivning. Fakturan listar 'REDWOOD' som huvudpost med underspecifikationer. Den identitetsbärande beteckningen matchar exakt. Tilläggen (KD, L/P, dimensioner) är produktspecifikationer som inte ändrar produktens identitet.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll — box 7-kvantitet 44,184 CBM identifierad i fakturan. Ytterligare kvantiteter (bruttovikt, antal paket) bekräftade utan motsägelse.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger 44,184 CBM. Fakturan anger uttryckligen '44,184 cbm' — exakt matchning. Bruttovikt 24 600 kgs matchar exakt (med tusentalsavskiljare-normalisering). 9 packages matchar. Alla kvantitetsuppgifter konsistenta.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Ursprungsland uttryckligen angivet i dedikerat fält i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 anger 'SWEDEN'. Fakturan har uttryckligt fält 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Exakt matchning efter normalisering (SWEDEN = Sweden). Ytterligare bekräftelse via shipping marks 'MADE IN SWEDEN'.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints applicable and MATCH. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW. comparison_result=IDENTICAL is consistent. All confidence values >= 0.97, well above 0.85 floor. Motivations consistently support MATCH conclusions.
